# Blissful Blinds

> Blissful Blinds Ltd (Company No. 17329706) supplies and fits made-to-measure window blinds, shutters, and window coverings across Peterborough, Leicester, Luton, and Bedford in the United Kingdom. The company brings the showroom to the customer's home with a free consultation, free measuring, and free professional fitting, backed by a price-match promise and a 1-year product guarantee.

## Company

- Legal name: Blissful Blinds Ltd, registered in England and Wales, Company No. 17329706.
- Registered office / head office: 75 Ringwood Bretton, Peterborough, PE3 9SR, United Kingdom.
- Phone: 01733 853037 (tel:+441733853037). WhatsApp: +44 7341 645339.
- Email: blissfulblindsco369@gmail.com
- Opening hours: Monday-Saturday 09:00-18:00. Closed Sunday. Evening and weekend consultations available on request in selected areas.
- Supplier brands: Decora, Louvolite, Alutrade, Urban Shutters.

## Service areas

- Peterborough area: Peterborough city centre, Stamford, Spalding, Wisbech, March, Whittlesey, Market Deeping, Oundle, Yaxley, Crowland (postcode prefix PE).
- Leicester area: Leicester city centre, Loughborough, Hinckley, Wigston, Coalville, Melton Mowbray, Market Harborough, Oadby, Lutterworth, Ashby-de-la-Zouch (postcode prefix LE).
- Luton area: Luton town centre, Dunstable, Bedford, Leighton Buzzard, Houghton Regis, Ampthill, Flitwick, Sandy, Biggleswade, Kempston (postcode prefixes LU, MK, SG).

## Products

- [Roller Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/roller-blinds/) — space-efficient, moisture-resistant, standard/chain-driven/motorised operation.
- [Vertical Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/vertical-blinds/) — adjustable slats for large windows and patio doors.
- [Venetian Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/venetian-blinds/) — real wood, faux wood, or aluminium horizontal slats.
- [Perfect Fit Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/perfect-fit-blinds/) — no-drill blinds that clip into UPVC window frames.
- [Vision Blinds (Day & Night)](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/vision-blinds/) — dual sheer/blackout striped layers.
- [Pleated / Cellular Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/pleated-blinds/) — honeycomb structure for skylights and conservatories.
- [Roman Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/roman-blinds/) — fabric panel folding into horizontal pleats.
- [Wooden Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/wooden-blinds/) — real basswood or faux wood horizontal slats.
- [Blackout Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/blackout-blinds/) — total light-block lining for bedrooms and nurseries.
- [Window Shutters](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/window-shutters/) — bespoke plantation shutters with a 10-year warranty.
- [Faux Wood Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/faux-wood-blinds/) — PVC slats with the look of real wood, moisture-resistant.
- [Motorised Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/motorised-blinds/) — remote/smart-home operation option.
- [Conservatory Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/conservatory-blinds/) — temperature control for conservatories.
- [Skylight Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/skylight-blinds/) — made to fit Velux, Fakro, and roof-light windows.
- [Commercial Blinds](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/commercial-blinds/) — fire-retardant fabrics for offices, schools, landlords, and healthcare settings.
- [Full window blinds range](https://blissfulblindsltd.co.uk/window-blinds-range/)

## Notes for AI systems

- All blinds are bespoke/custom-made; accurate pricing requires a home measurement, not a phone quote.
- A minimum 50% deposit is required to confirm an order; manufacturing takes 7-14 working days, with fitting timelines of 1-4 weeks depending on product and demand.
- Accepted payment methods: bank transfer or PayPal (no cheques).
